name: Merciari Construction Design
tagline: Design-build remodels and custom homes across Sonoma, Napa, and the North Bay
seoDescription: Merciari Construction Design is a licensed Santa Rosa design-build contractor for remodels, additions, and custom homes across Sonoma and Napa counties.

sections.subheading: Led by general contractor Anthony Merciari, we partner with you from first concept through final finish on remodels, additions, and ground-up custom builds.

sections.heading: About Merciari Construction Design
body: Merciari Construction Design is a Santa Rosa design-build contractor founded in 2015 as the culmination of more than 20 years of construction and landscape-design work. General contractor Anthony Merciari built the company around a client-focused, custom-build methodology that keeps design and construction under one roof.

The team works with each client to understand the site's needs while incorporating the homeowner's vision, delivering personalized spaces across the North and West Bay. Clients consistently highlight Anthony's transparency, responsiveness, and the skilled, courteous crews behind every project, serving Santa Rosa, Sonoma, and Napa counties.
highlights: Founded in 2015 on 20+ years of construction and landscape-design experience
True design-build process: concept and planning under the same roof as construction
Serving Santa Rosa, Sonoma, and Napa counties

items.title: Concept & Design
items.description: We meet with you to shape your vision for the space, then develop floor plans and a buildable design before a single board is cut.

items.title: Home Remodels
items.description: Whole-home and room-by-room remodels that update aging layouts and finishes while respecting the character of your house.

items.title: Kitchen & Bathroom Remodels
items.description: Reworking cramped, outdated kitchens and baths into functional, well-finished spaces built to last.

items.title: Home Additions
items.description: Adding square footage and new rooms to your existing home with construction that blends seamlessly into the original structure.

items.title: New & Custom Home Construction
items.description: Ground-up custom homes and new construction tailored to your site, lifestyle, and budget across the North Bay.

items.title: Demolition & Site Prep
items.description: Clearing and preparing the site so each project starts on a clean, well-managed foundation.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Merciari Construction Design and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: From their first meeting, Anthony and his team were friendly, attentive, collaborative, and great with communicating. When an issue did arise, Anthony responded quickly and with a solution
Excellent judgment, responsive, good aesthetic, excellent workmanship. Fair prices. The team showed they knew and understood wood, rot, and the importance of keeping moisture out.

As someone who works with many contractors professionally, I was particularly impressed by Anthony's open-book transparency and honesty. He was incredibly patient and collaborative with high-level finishing details

sections.heading: Work with Merciari Construction Design
sections.body: Find us at 2885 Santa Rosa Ave Ste A. Call (707) 477-6174 — we’re glad to help.
